meaning: adj.流行的,传染的,流行性n.时疫,疫疾流行,(风尚等的)流行,流行病
examples: Today, doctors are fearing a worldwide epidemic.
Hospitals were already fully extended because of the epidemic.
Health officials have successfully confined the epidemic to the Tabatinga area.
The best way to prevent a human epidemic, of course, is to end the avian one.
Those figures do not include the number of cases during this year's Swansea epidemic.
